meta_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no coding experience (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no coding experience. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve No-Code Barriers
content.seo_description: Overcome the no-coding barrier with our expert SaaS starter kit checklist. Leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to build, launch, and monetize your MVP fast.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for a technical co-founder. Use a pre-configured SaaS starter kit to bridge the no-code gap. By leveraging Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you can ship a production-ready, monetizable MVP in days, not months, while maintaining full control over your proprietary codebase.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is filled with brilliant ideas that never saw the light of day because the founder was trapped in the 'no-code' purgatory. You have the vision and the market insight, but the technical wall feels insurmountable—until now. Stop treating code as a black box and start wielding it as a competitive advantage.

We are entering the era of the AI-augmented builder. By utilizing a hardened SaaS starter kit, you bypass the boilerplate nightmare and jump straight to shipping features that solve real problems. This isn't just about building; it's about building a scalable engine that generates revenue while you focus on customer acquisition.

steps.title: Define the Value-Driven Architecture
steps.description: Establish the core database schema and authentication flow. Focus on the 'Happy Path' that leads directly to your first dollar of revenue.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-performance Next.js 14 architecture with Supabase integration. Include robust user authentication, Stripe subscription hooks, and a clean, modular folder structure designed for rapid iteration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project scaffolding with Next.js and Supabase schema'

steps.title: Build the Payment Gateway Foundation
steps.description: Monetization is the only metric that matters. Integrate Stripe immediately to validate that your solution is worth paying for.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Stripe checkout workflow including webhooks for subscription management, invoice generation, and customer portal access for SaaS users.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure stripe webhooks and implement subscription status checks in middleware'

steps.title: Implement AI-Powered Features
steps.description: Don't just build a CRUD app; build an intelligent assistant. Use Claude to wrap your core business logic in LLM-driven endpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an API route that accepts user input, processes it through an OpenAI/Anthropic SDK wrapper, and returns structured JSON output for the frontend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add AI service layer for processing user inputs via Anthropic API'

steps.title: Optimize for Conversion and UI/UX
steps.description: A beautiful UI is a trust signal. Use Tailwind CSS to ensure your MVP looks professional from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a responsive landing page and dashboard interface using Tailwind CSS and Radix UI components, focused on high-conversion CTA placement.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply tailwind styling to landing page and dashboard modules'

steps.title: Automate Deployment and CI/CD
steps.description: Remove the friction of hosting. Push your code to Vercel and automate the deployment pipeline so you can ship updates daily.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel, including environment variable management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup production deployment pipeline to Vercel with automated testing'

pro_tips: Prioritize 'Time-to-First-Dollar' over feature parity with incumbents; if the payment flow works, you have a business.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your payment webhooks; never ship financial code without verification.
Keep your database schema lean; over-engineering at the start will kill your pivot flexibility.
Leverage environment variables for all third-party keys; never hardcode credentials during the build phase.
Focus on one core user pain point; AI builders often fail by trying to build a platform rather than a solution.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, immediately implement analytics (like PostHog) to track user behavior. Shift your focus entirely to customer discovery and feedback loops to guide your next feature set.
content.conversion_block: You are closer to launching than you think. The barrier isn't the code; it's the inertia. Stop planning and start executing with the professional tools designed for founders who refuse to settle for 'no-code' limitations. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
